title: Light, Yeasty Kenyan Barramundi Cazuela
description: A light, flavorful weeknight dish from Kenya, featuring barramundi and a hint of yeast.
instructions: Season the barramundi fillets with salt and pepper.
In a small bowl, mix yeast and 1/4 cup lukewarm water to activate.
Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a cazuela over medium heat.
Add the onion and sauté until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the garlic and sauté for an additional minute.
Add the barramundi fillets and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until browned.
Transfer the cazuela to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro for added flavor.
Serve with a side of steamed vegetables or rice for a complete meal.
Enjoy your delicious Light, Yeasty Kenyan Barramundi Cazuela!
